info.name: SchooliAt Mobile API (Complete)
info.description:
Complete API reference for SchooliAt production backend. Generated from backend codebase analysis. All endpoints available to mobile (Android/iOS) for TEACHER, STUDENT, and EMPLOYEE roles.

Quick start:
- Set {{base_url}} (default https://api.schooliat.com)
- Run Authentication → POST auth/authenticate (it auto-saves {{auth_token}})
- Set {{x_platform}} to android or ios if needed

Seeded mobile login examples:
- teacher1@gis001.edu / Teacher@123
- student1@gis001.edu / Student@123
- john.doe@schooliat.com / Employee@123

Auth: /auth/* | API: /api/v1/*

request.description: Login. Body: { request: { email, password } }. Returns token and user with role, school.
Request OTP. Body: { request: { email, purpose } }. purpose: verification | password-reset | login | deletion
Verify OTP. Body: { request: { email, otp, purpose } }
Request password reset. Body: { request: { email } }
Reset password with OTP. Body: { request: { email, otp, newPassword } } or { token, password }
Change password (authenticated). Body: { request: { currentPassword, newPassword } }
Get roles allowed for mobile login (TEACHER, STUDENT, EMPLOYEE)
Get current user profile with role and school
List students. Query: page, limit, search, classId, academicYear, gender
Create employee. Body: { request: { email, password, firstName, lastName, roleId, ... } }
Get student by ID (same as GET /students/:id)
Mark single attendance. Body: { request: { studentId, classId, date, status, periodId?, lateArrivalTime?, absenceReason? } }
Mark bulk attendance. Body: { request: { classId, date, attendance: [{ studentId, status, absenceReason? }] } }
Get attendance. Query: studentId, classId, startDate, endDate, status
Create homework. Body: { request: { title, description, classIds, subjectId, dueDate, isMCQ?, attachments?, mcqQuestions? } }
Submit homework. Body: { request: { homeworkId, files?, mcqAnswers? } }
Submit homework (id in URL). Body: { request: { files?, mcqAnswers? } }
Grade homework. Body: { request: { submissionId, grade?, feedback?, marksObtained?, totalMarks? } }
Grade homework (id in URL). Body: { request: { submissionId, grade?, feedback?, marksObtained?, totalMarks? } }
List homework. Query: homeworkId, studentId, classId, subjectId, status, page, limit
Get MCQ results for a homework
Enter marks. Body: { request: { examId, studentId, subjectId, classId, marksObtained, maxMarks } }
Calculate result. Body: { request: { examId, classId } }
Publish results. Body: { request: { examId, classId? } }
Publish results (alias). Body: { request: { examId, classId? } }
Get marks. Query: examId, studentId, classId. Role-based.
Get timetables. Query: classId, teacherId, subjectId, timetableId, date
List notes. Query: subjectId, classId, chapter, topic, page, limit
Create note. Body: { request: { title, subjectId, classId, chapter, fileId, description? } }
List syllabus. Query: subjectId, classId, academicYear, page, limit
Create leave request. Body: { request: { leaveTypeId, startDate, endDate, reason } }
List leave requests. Query: userId, status, startDate, endDate, page, limit
Get leave balance. Query: userId?, year?
Leave history. Query: userId, status, startDate, endDate, page, limit
Fee status summary (totalAmount, paidAmount, pendingAmount, installments). Query: studentId?, year?
Get installments by number. Query: end?, academicYear?
Get fee installments for a student
Record payment for an installment. Body: { request: { amount, paymentMethod, otp, ... } }
Create conversation. Body: { request: { participants, type, title? } }
Send message. Body: { request: { conversationId, content, attachments? } }
Send message (conversationId in URL). Body: { request: { content, attachments? } }
Get conversation messages. Query: page, limit, beforeMessageId
Create announcement. Body: { request: { title, content, targetUserIds?, targetRoles? } }
List announcements (notifications type ANNOUNCEMENT). Query: page, limit
List notifications. Query: isRead, type, page, limit
Calendar view / events. Query: month, date, pageNumber, pageSize
Get file by ID (stream or metadata with URL)
List schools. Query: page, limit, search
Get platform content (e.g. terms, privacy, support)
List subjects. Query: classId, page, limit
